name: Grits Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring 3-1/2 cups of milk to boiling.
2. Gradually stir in the grits.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens (about 10 minutes).
4. Remove from heat and add butter and garlic cheese; stir until melted.
5. Stir in the beaten eggs and remaining milk.
6. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit uncovered for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese over the top.
9. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
